violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Temperatures in the fridge ranged from 46-51 degrees.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The inside of all 3 microwaves have a build up on the inside and need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Counter top underneath the juice/coffee machine needs to be cleaned. Inside the cupboards and the edges of the drawers in the kitchen and in the customer area need to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. Only a 2 compartment sink is provided and is not being utilized to properly wash dishes and utensils.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during the mechanical warewashing operation. No sanitizer was being used to clean dishes and utensils.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. The dish machine had the presence of dust and cobwebs, was told by operator that it does not work.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. 2 wet mops sitting on the floor next to the trash can. Need to be placed in a position to allow airflow and properly dry.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Chemicals stored above single use items and dishes in the cupboards above the handwash sink.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
